title: Oil prices rise as energy shares gain
text: Energy companies gained after crude oil prices moved higher on supply concerns. Analysts said the move could affect transport and manufacturing costs.

title: Local club wins championship final
text: The football club won the championship after a late goal in the final match. Supporters celebrated the result across the city.

title: New chip design improves AI inference
text: A semiconductor company announced a new accelerator design for faster AI inference and lower power consumption in data centers.

title: European ministers discuss digital policy
text: European ministers met to discuss digital regulation, data protection, and cross-border technology policy for public services.
